title: Get last activity date of the users
excerpt: I need to get the last activity time of the users through API in order to identify users who have not been actively using the application. even if i can get the last login time of each user, that will be good enough.

posts.author: himank.gupta (Himank Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to get the last activity time of the users through API in order to identify users who have not been actively using the application. even if i can get the last login time of each user, that will be good enough.

posts.author: DanWi (Daniel Wirawan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @himank.gupta
You can select the Admin setting, and then Users. This page will show you all users and their last login.
Hope this helps

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
